main.description: Subscribe to stratos events. When 'did' is provided, subscribes to record updates for that account. When omitted, subscribes to service-level events (enrollments). AppViews must provide a signed service JWT via syncToken.

did.description: The DID of the account to subscribe to. If omitted, subscribes to service-level enrollment events.

cursor.description: The last known event sequence number to resume from.

domain.description: Optional domain filter. Only events for records with this domain in their boundary will be emitted.

syncToken.description: Signed service JWT for AppView authentication. Must include iss, aud, exp, and lxm claims. Required for service callers; owner callers may use the Authorization header instead.

commit.description: A commit event containing record operations.

seq.description: The sequence number of this event.

time.description: Timestamp of when the event was sequenced.

ops.description: List of record operations in this commit.

recordOp.description: A single record operation within a commit.

cid.description: The CID of the record. Present for create and update operations.

record.description: The record content. Present for create and update operations.

info.description: An informational message about the subscription state.

message.description: Additional details about the info message.

enrollment.description: An enrollment event indicating a user has enrolled or unenrolled from the service.

boundaries.description: The boundaries assigned to the user.
